_doc: Synthetic fixture set for branch 1 (COM registration corruption) of the excel-activities/excel-application-scope-failures playbook. KEY CONTRAST vs excel-card-excel-not-installed: here Excel IS installed (Microsoft 365 build path given in the logs) but the Excel.Application type-library registration is stale/broken after an in-place Office upgrade -> inner TYPE_E_LIBNOTREGISTERED (0x8002801D), NOT REGDB_E_CLASSNOTREG-because-absent. Agent must chain: folders -> jobs list faulted -> jobs get (BusinessException 'Make sure Excel is installed.' inner TYPE_E_LIBNOTREGISTERED) -> jobs logs (Trace: install state INSTALLED + recent Office upgrade + stale TypeLib) -> workflow source (single Classic scope). The fix is Office Online Repair / UiPath Repair Tool / TypeLib cleanup, NOT 'install Excel'.

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key f00eeeee-3333-4444-5555-666677778888 --state Faulted --output json
